搵唔到AIP新資料

從2017年1月1日起，就業准證(Employment Pass, EP)的申請條件實施新規定：

1. 在新加坡當地找到工作

2. 就任於管理或專業技術職位

3. 最新月薪為3600新幣(工作經驗豐富的申請人月薪要求更高)

4. 擁有大學本科學士學位、職業認證或專業技能

平均6.5喎，come on，身為一個連登仔，「其實唔難」呢樣嘢可以唔單止掛喺口邊的。

According to the latest study from IDP Education, an international education organisation that provides student placements in different countries, Hong Kong’s average score was 6.5 on a nine-point scale in 2015. It ranked third among Asian countries and territories, followed by Indonesia (6.4), Taiwan (6.1), South Korea (5.9), Japan (5.8) and China (5.7). Malaysia and the Philippines came first with their average score of 6.8. Singapore was not included in the study because there were only a few candidates to take this test, the study explained.

http://yp.scmp.com/news/hong-kong/article/104397/hong-kong-maintains-third-place-asian-ielts-rankings

QS測量狗，諗住5-6年後走

諗過紐西蘭同澳洲，開頭諗住紐西蘭易D，但宜家計過下，澳洲會易走好多

假設32歲前走，就六年工作經驗，澳洲189同190都可行，但前題要Ielts 全7，咁189就有60分，190就有65分，再讀埋RMIT Master就兩個vida各加5分

但有兩三個隱憂
1 六年後 Quantity surveyor可能已經不在技術移民list, 2017年2200個位有1600人申請
2 工作經驗會被扣減，我做細MC,有機會俾AIQs扣工作經驗
3 去到當地可能難搵工

但好現實講，其實你要移民，要見工，ielts全7一方面滿足移民局，另一方面都係確保你自己job interivew過到骨

紐西蘭就大既130/135分左右，紐西蘭煩再拿左working visa仲要九個月內搵到工，做夠兩年先有pr,沒澳洲咁安全

Age = 25(或者30)
Education = 15
Overseas Exp = 10(或者5)
English = 10

若冇English，根本只係得55分Max，而且好難搵州保你果5分。若語言唔差，5分可以諗下挑戰NAATI喎，不過搞得NAATI不如去挑戰IELTS/PTE啦

諗過紐西蘭同澳洲，開頭諗住紐西蘭易D，但宜家計過下，澳洲會易走好多

假設32歲前走，就六年工作經驗，澳洲189同190都可行，但前題要Ielts 全7，咁189就有60分，190就有65分，再讀埋RMIT Master就兩個vida各加5分

但有兩三個隱憂
1 六年後 Quantity surveyor可能已經不在技術移民list, 2017年2200個位有1600人申請
2 工作經驗會被扣減，我做細MC,有機會俾AIQs扣工作經驗
3 去到當地可能難搵工

但好現實講，其實你要移民，要見工，ielts全7一方面滿足移民局，另一方面都係確保你自己job interivew過到骨

紐西蘭就大既130/135分左右，紐西蘭煩再拿左working visa仲要九個月內搵到工，做夠兩年先有pr,沒澳洲咁安全

我唔係做audit做com sec, 所以考ICSA, 遲d會考埋ACCA

QS測量狗，諗住5-6年後走

諗過紐西蘭同澳洲，開頭諗住紐西蘭易D，但宜家計過下，澳洲會易走好多

假設32歲前走，就六年工作經驗，澳洲189同190都可行，但前題要Ielts 全7，咁189就有60分，190就有65分，再讀埋RMIT Master就兩個vida各加5分

但有兩三個隱憂
1 六年後 Quantity surveyor可能已經不在技術移民list, 2017年2200個位有1600人申請
2 工作經驗會被扣減，我做細MC,有機會俾AIQs扣工作經驗
3 去到當地可能難搵工

但好現實講，其實你要移民，要見工，ielts全7一方面滿足移民局，另一方面都係確保你自己job interivew過到骨

紐西蘭就大既130/135分左右，紐西蘭煩再拿左working visa仲要九個月內搵到工，做夠兩年先有pr,沒澳洲咁安全

我估5,6年之後可能無visa 可以一步拎pr

Fed tax
Medicare Tax
OASDI
State Tax
Pension/401k
Health insurance
Union Due
Life/Disability insurance
一出糧就十九幾樣嘢咁七除八扣

好喇扣撚完喇，就得返2/3落袋
到file tax return嗰陣呢？
1040 Schedule A而家可以用嚟itemized嘅得供樓利息(你攞MCC就話固定俾返利息嘅20％俾你，但首先有幾多人係FTHB first time home buyer, 間屋個價under limit, 申請loan嗰陣知道MCC嘅存在同埋識得搵負責MCC嘅loan broker? 大銀行睬你有味), 地稅 (我自己要俾差唔多8500美金一年), State income tax. 我又唔撚係做生意嘅撚有Schedule C去話有business expense/loss. 而家做埋收租公仲要file埋Schedule E.

講返Schedule A. 話好多嘢扣，你老味咪可以扣union due囉，或者再加埋慈善機構捐款喇？扣扣埋埋都係將taxable income降低咋，你估變到唔使俾？

同埋，以上全部嘢都係講緊Federal income tax. 睇下開頭俾咗幾撚多嘢？同埋，你tax return攞得多錢返嚟即係你戇戇鳩鳩咁免息貸款借咗錢俾聯邦政府成年佢而家先還俾你。

除咗入息稅，地稅，供屋供車，醫療保險之外，汽車保險，家居保險唔使買丫？汽車保險喺有屋之後又唔可以買最低保額，唔係嘅萬一發生意外唔夠賠嘅話分分鐘屋都無埋。

生仔又係另一樣分分鐘貴過供屋嘅事。

以上嘅嘢全部係中產要煩嘅。唔使煩嘅話一係你好撚有錢一係你好撚窮唔使煩咁多嘢。你條撚屌次撚次剩係識同人講美國福利幾好有幾多著數可以攞。含撚啦死蝗蟲。最好咪撚生仔丫！你啲咁撚樣嘅DNA喺你呢代絕撚咗佢就差唔多！

同埋，以上全部嘢都係講緊Federal income tax. 睇下開頭俾咗幾撚多嘢？同埋，你tax return攞得多錢返嚟即係你戇戇鳩鳩咁免息貸款借咗錢俾聯邦政府成年佢而家先還俾你。

除咗入息稅，地稅，供屋供車，醫療保險之外，汽車保險，家居保險唔使買丫？汽車保險喺有屋之後又唔可以買最低保額，唔係嘅萬一發生意外唔夠賠嘅話分分鐘屋都無埋。

生仔又係另一樣分分鐘貴過供屋嘅事。

以上嘅嘢全部係中產要煩嘅。唔使煩嘅話一係你好撚有錢一係你好撚窮唔使煩咁多嘢。你條撚屌次撚次剩係識同人講美國福利幾好有幾多著數可以攞。含撚啦死蝗蟲。最好咪撚生仔丫！你啲咁撚樣嘅DNA喺你呢代絕撚咗佢就差唔多！

English school teacher is not on the UK's shortage occupation list - so you cannot get a work permit as an English teacher.

Only Chemistry, Maths and Physics school teachers are on the UK's shortage occupation list. (See page 7 of the link below)

https://www.gov.uk/government/uploads/system/uploads/attachment_data/file/486107/Shortage_Occupation_List_-_November_2015.pdf

If you gain your British Citizenship by the 1990 British Nationality (Hong Kong) Act (居英權計劃), you can be a British Citizen by descent. Any child of yours born outside of the UK may not get British Citizenship.

By giving birth in the UK will enable your child to have British Citizenship. In the case of a birth in Northern Ireland (Belfast for example), your child will also have Irish citizenship as long as one of the child's parent is a British Citizen at the time of the child's birth.

If you want your child to have British Citizenship - make sure the child is born in the UK.

Please note that Northern Ireland will be better as the child will get Irish citizenship too.

Northern Ireland
Sounds a very good idea never thought about it, how're the hospitals there? only think of living in London


NHS hospitals are okay - as a British Citizen, you are entitle to free NHS health care as soon as you enter the UK. If both of you (兩公婆) are British Citizens, going to give birth in Northern Ireland will be free in NHS hospitals. Please note that British Citizens will need to meet a habitual residence test before getting any welfare benefits from the government.

The child will be a British Citizen as well as Irish citizen if he/she was born in Northern Ireland as long as one of you is a British Citizen at the time of the baby's birth. Having Irish citizenship means that the child can live and work in Europe as well.

Starting a new life in the UK is a big move. You and your wife may want to come for a visit before making the decision. What kind of jobs you have in mind? You can apply for a British passport in Hong Kong using the link below -

https://www.gov.uk/overseas-passports

係外國好多職業都受人尊重 依個係事實

話說，tg有個大移民group，入面有班想去外國嘅人型蝗蟲喺香港撈唔掂，以為去到外國就會有車有樓；同時亦有班正常人已經去咗外國，亦適應咗外國嘅生活模式，有自己嘅事業同埋生活。

一樣米養百樣人，我喺美國識嘅朋友同我一樣都係親屬移民過嚟嘅，唔會存在R身份呢個問題。由於我哋喺度讀大學然後搵工做嘢，亦都唔存在由香港高薪厚職移民嚟做騾仔呢樣嘢。

身為第一代移民，我剩係想做個普普通通嘅中產，有間自己嘅屋，有份我鍾意嘅工，同埋一個家。第時仔女唔會怨我死窮撚，同埋有舊錢俾佢哋讀大學等佢哋唔使孭債畢業就心滿意足。咁當然，可以嘅話我想儲多筆俾佢哋做首期，不過暫時未有能力。

移民去外國嘅原因，我舅父8x年話共產黨97收返香港之後香港會仆街，所以搵定條後路俾屋企人。香港有無仆到街就見人見智喇。你係想睇下個世界有幾大嘅，去旅行啦。但係你覺得呢個地方已經無嘢再值得你留戀嘅話，咁就移民啦。之不過，乜柒技能都無嘅話就唔好諗喇，唔好做人型蝗蟲。

189教師暫時60分都夠，因為189最快，夠分數就填expression of interest，一個月度批，之後上載所需文件、驗身、打指模，幾個月內搞掂。

關於IELTS，個人覺得speaking 8.0較難拎，listening 就好易，只要你聽多啲IELTS past paper, 聽夠十次，點都擺到。有人話澳洲考speaking 易拎高分，個人經驗：响星加坡考speaking拎7.5，但香港考拎6.5。

If you want your child to have British Citizenship - make sure the child is born in the UK.

Please note that Northern Ireland will be better as the child will get Irish citizenship too.

Northern Ireland
Sounds a very good idea never thought about it, how're the hospitals there? only think of living in London


NHS hospitals are okay - as a British Citizen, you are entitle to free NHS health care as soon as you enter the UK. If both of you (兩公婆) are British Citizens, going to give birth in Northern Ireland will be free in NHS hospitals. Please note that British Citizens will need to meet a habitual residence test before getting any welfare benefits from the government.

The child will be a British Citizen as well as Irish citizen if he/she was born in Northern Ireland as long as one of you is a British Citizen at the time of the baby's birth. Having Irish citizenship means that the child can live and work in Europe as well.

Starting a new life in the UK is a big move. You and your wife may want to come for a visit before making the decision. What kind of jobs you have in mind? You can apply for a British passport in Hong Kong using the link below -

https://www.gov.uk/overseas-passports

If both of you (兩公婆) are British Citizens, going to give birth in Northern Ireland will be free in NHS hospitals. Please note that British Citizens will need to meet a habitual residence test before getting any welfare benefits from the government.

The child will be a British Citizen as well as Irish citizen if he/she was born in Northern Ireland as long as one of you is a British Citizen at the time of the baby's birth. Having Irish citizenship means that the child can live and work in Europe as well.

Starting a new life in the UK is a big move. You and your wife may want to come for a visit before making the decision. What kind of jobs you have in mind? You can apply for a British passport in Hong Kong using the link below -

https://www.gov.uk/overseas-passports

背景：小學教畜，有親戚係澳洲住左好多年
諗住過去做special edu or early childhood edu
係咪可以apply 489?
489 係咪易過189/190?
有無巴打解答

189易啲，反正教蓄都要IELTS 7,7,8,8，考到已經多10分，總分60就夠。


但可唔可以用489 借親戚再屈多10 分？


189教師暫時60分都夠，因為189最快，夠分數就填expression of interest，一個月度批，之後上載所需文件、驗身、打指模，幾個月內搞掂。

關於IELTS，個人覺得speaking 8.0較難拎，listening 就好易，只要你聽多啲IELTS past paper, 聽夠十次，點都擺到。有人話澳洲考speaking 易拎高分，個人經驗：响星加坡考speaking拎7.5，但香港考拎6.5。

請教下巴打係咪要考完ielts先報EOI?

Even as a British Citizen, you cannot get UK social welfare benefits (綜援) until you satisfy the habitual residence test.

You will get free NHS health service once you arrive in the UK.

If you are planning to get a job in the UK, you should get a National Insurance number as soon as you arrive in the UK. Please see link below for details -

https://www.gov.uk/apply-national-insurance-number

Please note that you may not be able to pass on your British Citizenship to the next generation born outside of the UK if you get your British Citizenship via your parent in the British Nationality Selection Scheme (居英權) in the 1990s.

不論你有冇出世紙有冇你老豆呢個名(我估父親個欄,一係留空,一係閣下大名)
美國政府先會問你一個問題:呢個仔係咪你biological son...
如果你答YES....佢地會整個絕招...DNA TEST !
如果你答NO....佢地有可能會suspect 你將呢個細路放落黎個申請表既目的....最後有可能reject application (或者係conditional visa issued)
所以係申請個陣要講清楚每個人既關係
不過如果係等侯途中有變....都要講得清清楚楚...

我明移民政策成日轉 但睇過大部分pnp都係讀夠1-2年 之後會批1-2年既visa比你搵工 有僱主offer就可以申請移民 我估未來十年內應該唔會有太大改動？

咁你無論如何都做一年野先
因為咩class都要1年起錶，有多再加分

依加express entry 要41x
只要ielts攞盡分其實以已經好近
畢業後工作最後都係跟express entry不過會加多d分

一般有offer同公司肯sponsor都無咩問題
難在好多公司唔肯sponsor，專門行業同厭惡性行業會容易d


想問你指既起碼一年工作係加拿大境內？點樣會無端端有公司出working visa比我過去做野？<--亦因為呢個原因我認為係當地留學後會容易D有工作offer

再者working visa好似同移民唔太關係，因為working visa個目的唔係比你移民，一完就要走，個公司要肯擔保你先可以申請移民？所以working visa作用係儲一年當地工作經驗加分？

頭盔定先，睇左好多資料有D亂唔係好肯定 有錯請指正


只係要合格申請express entry 的話，一年工作係加拿大境內外都得(要提供證明 移民部有機會聯絡你老闆提供資料)。境內的話加多d分


畢業後嘅work permit 比你做野，做夠合資格就可以apply express entry 咁樣申請唔需要sponsor 簡單一封公司reference letter就得 但是未來唔知會唔會cut

federal sponsor嘅標準高好多(政府會audit間公司) 手續多好多 重要比錢 所以無咩人肯做 (詳情google "Canada LMIA")
Provincial sponsor programs 每個省有自己audit標準

其實無任何工作經驗就咩工都當你新仔，
不過本地住過你英文多少會有進步，再揾工一定有幫助 語文溝通能力比學歷重要得多

最後 移到民一件事 到步揾工又另一件事
好多高學歷/專業人士揾唔到食被逼回流，好d嘅從事較低技術工作或者創業

有間日本公司請我過去做野，人工得番而家三分二，每年仲有一半時間去東南亞出差。經高度人材制攞PR，要而家公司出信證明工作經驗，冇的話就唔夠分。要住滿十年先有PR ，真係好令人郤步。唔知去唔去好。

定係試下公司內部轉去澳洲英國呢。
PS 工程撚，同一間公司做左十年

Other PNP streams
http://www.ontarioimmigration.ca/en/pnp/OI_PNPCAPITAL.html

It's ok, the immigration system is messy, complicated and ever-changing, to say the least

I am sorry, the answer is no.

Yes you can register as a British Citizen using form B(OTA) if you are a BN(O) passport holder or naturalise using your HKSAR passport (form AN) after 5 years' residence in the UK. However, you need to have Indefinite Leave to Remain (ILR) for a year before your application in order to succeed.

You can get ILR in the following ways -

1) 5 years in the UK under Tier 2 work permit
2) 5 years in the UK under a spouse visa
3) 10 years legal stay in the UK under the long resident
https://www.gov.uk/long-residence/overview

Ok, trying to reply a few posts all here

10 years from study to work, still finding a permanent place to settle.. this country is bigger than you can imagine. I studied just outside Toronto. My personal feeling is that Toronto is a worker class city. The city is industrious and with mix of cultures, living together in respect. There isn't as much natural beauty to boast as Vancouver and Calgary but it's still has lots of offer. I'd imagine Toronto feels lesser of a great city than London because it's so spread out.

Go north of Toronto and you will find beautiful small lakeside towns. Collingwood (1 hr north), Muskoka and Algonquin Park (3.5 hr north) are favorite cottage vacation destinations.

The government is in fact lowering the bars of immigration, in favor of people with personal & family ties (adding points for Canadian graduates, Canadian siblings, higher quota for marriage sponsor, etc.). But then things can change rapidly and without signs.

Regardless of streams, you will need to create an express entry profile for both applying to federal program and accepting provincial nominations. Just calculate the how many points you get and go from there. (You may not even need PNP. After all, the whole reason of nomination is to boost your points)

AFAIK, you can't just apply to Ontario's PNP. The Ontario office sends you invitation after you created the profile, until then you can apply to their PNP. As long as the PNP office satisfy with all the documents they need, refusals are very unlikely.

---

Heavy duty trades are always in heavy demand from what I heard

Because most immigration streams (Federal & provincial nomination) uses point system to determine eligibility, you are much less likely to be eligible without degree (maybe some other province has a stream for you. do your homework) With a trade cert, you are eligible in a separate stream for tradesperson

Studying as international student is expensive. From what I know there isn't much difference in where you trade was learned, as long as it is recognized by provincial governments so check their requirements for a transfer

Certs in French doesn't matter in immigration, only exam result does. TEF is the only recognized French exam. It's hard to say if its worth the effort of learning French just for the sake of immigration, but regardless of where you learn French, being bilingual is an advantage in job market, especially with federal gov't

---

Shit I wrote too much. But good luck to you all
TL;DR calculate Express entry score first and then plot the next course of action

Thanks for taking the time to reply. I am now caught up in a dilemma right now. I wont have time for university and tradeschools so i need to choose either of them. And im not sure wether it's worth a shot to do a degree since it is expensive and time consuming.(i would prefer getting a job in the trades) so whats your take on this??

And I have checked so many websites about the "immigration streams" ..theres is federal program ,nominal program . quebec skilled worker program... i am so confused right now. Is there a website that explains how it works?

IMHO, university degree is next to useless beyond immigration, it means very little in the eyes of companies. Real life work experience is more important but companies values local/domestic knowledge. Trade, on the hand, is indeed useful if you can transfer the HK qualifications to provincial red seal

Sadly, there is no official road map because they are all managed by different governments. Maybe you'll find some consultants who made infographics of it (Or I'll just spend a little time making one myself).

In the most TL;DR way, Economic Class comes in 3 streams:

Skilled worker - Federal programs, for
PNP - Provincial nomination - Each province sets its own criteria, so check their own websites
QSW - Quebec class - Quebec does its own thing, because Quebec

Each class has their own subset with its own sets of specific criteria

Whichever way you take, it all leads to applying to federal gov't who makes final decisions. In general, if you meet all the eligibility listed publicly, and they verified you in medical, criminal and security checks, there's almost no other reason they would refuse you.

The link you posted is for citizenship. You will need permanent residency (PR) + other requirements before you can apply citizenship. Federal PR programs only accepts TEF
But Quebec's QSW does recognize DALF (didn't know that until I google)
http://www.immigration-quebec.gouv.qc.ca/en/immigrate-settle/permanent-workers/requirements-programs/language-knowledge.html

"Use this tool to get started"
http://www.cic.gc.ca/ctc-vac/getting-started.asp

Skilled worker - Federal programs, streams for workers in Technical, Professional, managerial positions, tradesperson or people who worked in Canada

睇緊英國果個20萬磅 企業家計劃......又唔知點玩法


Please see link below for details -

https://www.gov.uk/tier-1-entrepreneur/overview


好似有得諗. 我會同朋友做android/ios app development + some websites development . 唔知英國現在IT創業 環境如何?


I don't know anything about IT business in the UK. You will need to do more research on UK's IT business environment before moving towards getting a Tier 1 visa.

Another point for you to consider is that if you have British National (Overseas) status, use your BN(O) passport to apply for your UK Tier 1 visa. There are a number of advantages over HKSAR passport -

1) BN(O) passport holders do not need to register with the local police where they live, while HKSAR passport holders, as Chinese nationals, are required to register with the local police in the UK.

2) BN(O) passport holders, as Commonwealth citizens, can register to vote in all UK elections. Being on the electoral roll helps you to build up your credit history in the UK. HKSAR passport holders are not entitle to register to vote in the UK.

3) BN(O) passport holders can register to become a British Citizen using form B(OTA), which is cheaper than naturalisation for HKSAR passport holders. (Registration using form B(OTA) cost £1163 vs Naturalisation using form AN cost £1282 - both are 2017 prices)

First thing - renew your BN(O) passport on-line using the link below -

https://www.gov.uk/overseas-passports

Second thing - what kind of skills you have? Your skills may get you a job in the UK.

Third point - are you under 31? You can get an UK working holiday visa to work in the UK for 2 years. BN(O) passport holders can apply at any time while HKSAR passport holders need to get a certificate of sponsorship from the Hong Kong Labour department.

Last point - have you think of joining the British Army? You can get UK Indefinite Leave to Remain (ILR) after 4 years of service. ILR is PR in the UK.
